race.comment: Good race. COTE ATLANTIQUE (2) opened this prep in New Zealand five weeks ago and did well to finish third in the Group 3 King's Plate over 1200m at Ellerslie. Subsequently won a Ballarat jump-out enroute to this. Drawn awkwardly but with even luck he can take this out. CASTILLIAN (9) is in line for the hat trick after digging deep to score in a BM85 over this course and distance last time out. Drops 6kgs but has a horror draw to contend with - needs some Ange Jones magic. EXOTIQUE MISS (8) continued her progression this prep when third in a $150k feature over 1200m at Toowoomba recently. Looking for this trip now and is beautifully in after Webb's claim. MARGOT'S DEEL (15) came from worse than midfield to get up for second when resuming over 1200m at the Gold Coast last start. Genuine mare who is in the mix despite a wide draw. MISS JOELENE (1) has won four from seven when fresh so she must be respected coming off a 12-week spell.
